nameEn: IEEE Conference on Software Engineering Education and Training
description: An IEEE conference on software engineering education and training, covering SE curricula, pedagogy, and industry-academia collaboration in education. It aims to innovate and improve software engineering education practices.
descriptionKo: 소프트웨어 공학 교육 및 훈련에 특화된 IEEE 학회로, SE 교육 과정, 교수법, 산학 협력 교육 등을 다룬다. 소프트웨어 공학 교육의 혁신과 개선을 목표로 하는 교육 전문 학회이다.
descriptionEn: An IEEE conference on software engineering education and training, covering SE curricula, pedagogy, and industry-academia collaboration in education. It aims to innovate and improve software engineering education practices.
